meaning: n.两家卖主垄断市场(的局面)
examples: Their smaller rival is battling to end their duopoly.
A new movement is trying to break an old duopoly.
This would boost voter choice and break the two-party duopoly.
At first the duopoly dismissed Passage, claiming it was insecure and doomed to failure.
Here the concept of duopoly is applicable, because Android has two thirds of the market.
